git_log_oneline_8.stdout:
5e2474f feat: browser-smoke Batch B generated avatar candidates
e802acd feat: add six new experimental generated avatars and corresponding load smoke tests
1b219cf docs: pre-mega-run analysis reports — browser smoke pass, inventory delta, batch plan
bdfce0f feat: test-only generated avatar loader via ?generatedAvatar= query param
e414eee feat: expand model audit framework with new analysis tools, avatar specs, and extensive character simulation reports.
12afd70 feat: implement hand and wrist bone tracking with configurable wrist gain
06b2577 feat: add Seed-san.vrm avatar to public assets
a1047e5 Commit avatar VRMs and ship them on Vercel deploys.
